title: [ESI] Add skid buffer to Cosim_Endpoint_ToHost
body: It has been observed that some simulators (verilator) does not handle combinational driving from DPI well (resulting in non-determinism wrt. some of the combinational outputs being dropped/replicated). Questa does not show this behavior. A mitigation is to add a skid buffer to decouple the DPI interface from the output interface.
